title: Arabian Comte Pilaf Bake
description: A rich and savory pilaf dish infused with the flavors of the Arabian Peninsula, topped with melted Comte cheese.

ingredients.name: Arabian Spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: In a large baking dish, combine cooked pilaf, shredded Comte cheese, minced garlic, and Arabian spices. Mix well.
Top the pilaf mixture with chopped parsley.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
